name: Containers & Orchestration
description: Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift container platforms — crash loops, OOM kills, resource limits, and orchestration health.
quickTip: Deploy Splunk Connect for Kubernetes (SCK) to ingest container logs and cluster events.

subcategories.name: Docker
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Connect for Docker, custom scripted inputs

subcategories.name: Kubernetes
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector for Kubernetes, Splunk Connect for Kubernetes — Free

subcategories.name: OpenShift
subcategories.primaryAppTa: OpenTelemetry Collector, OpenShift audit log forwarding

subcategories.name: Service Mesh & Serverless Containers
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector (Istio/Envoy metrics and access logs), `Splunk_TA_aws` (ECS/Fargate), `Splunk_TA_microsoft-cloudservices` (Azure Monitor), `Splunk_TA_google-cloudplatform` (Cloud Run / Cloud Monitoring)
